steps_completed.task: Install D3 modules: d3-force, d3-selection, d3-zoom, d3-drag and their @types/* packages
Create useForceGraph hook encapsulating d3.forceSimulation setup, node/link diffing, position state, alpha restart, and cleanup
Create edge derivation utility deriveEdges.ts for computing undirected edges from clique co-membership with deduplication
Build core ForceDirectedGraph component with SVG nodes, edges, clique overlays, NodeWithDetail pattern, and onNodeClick
Add zoom/pan behavior via d3-zoom on SVG element with constrained extent and double-click reset
Add node drag behavior via d3-drag with fx/fy pinning, alpha restart, and release on drag end
Implement dynamic clique overlays computing bounding box from member positions with padding, rendered as rounded SVG rects
Implement focus highlight (thicker stroke, dim non-connected nodes), status dots, probability bars, legend
Replace BayesNetGraph in MarketDetail.tsx with ForceDirectedGraph, update import and usage
Rewrite tests: ForceDirectedGraph.test.tsx with mocked useForceGraph hook, deriveEdges.test.ts for edge utility. 20 tests total, all passing.
